parityMeta.describes: iOS-17e-2 performance-lookup parity — performance-drop branch. Three completed push-a bench-press sessions, most-recent-first: the latest tops at 50x5 (value 250) while the two prior tops are 80x5 (value 400 each, baseline 400). latest < baseline*0.9 => buildAdaptiveState flags performanceDrops:[bench-press] and +2s the bench-press issues (upper_crossed/scapular_control/breathing_ribcage), all staying < 4 so moduleDose is baseline. No pain. FUNCTION-LEVEL compute-assert: the Swift AdaptiveFeedbackEngine re-runs findLast/findPrevious/findRecent + buildAdaptiveState on the echoed engineInput.history and asserts equality.
parityMeta.sourceNotes: Synthetic history via makeSession (push-a / bench-press), most-recent-first. performanceValue = max(topValue, volume*0.1); topValue uses number(weight)*max(1,reps). lastUpdated is substituted with the deterministic clock date (the TS new Date() wall-clock stamp is non-deterministic).
